LAW AND MOTION 302, NO OTHER APPEARANCE. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS ASHWIN LADVA AND LADVA LAW FIRM'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH TWENTY DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ALL CLAIMS. NO LEGALLY RECOGNIZABLE CONTRACT OR FIDUCIARY RELATIONSHIP AROSE AS A RESULT OF DEFENDANTS' KNOWLEDGE OF PLAINTIFF'S LIEN. PLAINTIFF IS GIVEN LEAVE TO AMEND, IF IT CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH, TO ALLEGE A FIDUCIARY OR OTHER RELATIONSHIP OF CONFIDENCE AND TRUST BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS, HOW AND WHY DEFENDANTS OWED PLAINTIFF A DUTY TO DISCLOSE, AND A CONTRACTUAL RELATIONSHIP UPON WHICH THE IMPLIED COVENANT OF GOOD FAITH AND FAIR DEALING IS BASED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF LAW OFFICE OF IAN P. ZIMMERMAN APC'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND FOR APPOINTMENT OF ARBITRATOR IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JANUARY 7, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF LAW OFFICE OF IAN P. ZIMMERMAN APC'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND FOR APPOINTMENT OF ARBITRATOR IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO PROVE THE EXISTENCE OF AN AGREEMENT TO ARBITRATE BETWEEN THE PARTIES. PLAINTIFF ALSO FAILS TO CITE ANY AUTHORITY THAT ALLOWS THIS COURT TO ORDER NON-PARTY MIRTH ESTRADA TO ARBITRATE HER FEE DISPUTE WITH PLAINTIFF. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: LAVENNA WARD, CSR # 7077

Notice Of Petition And Petition To Compel Arba And For Appointment Of Arbitrator
Off Calendar Jan-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
PLAINTIFF LAW OFFICE OF IAN P. ZIMMERMAN APC's Petition To Compel Arbitration And For Appointment Of Arbitrator is denied. Plaintiff fails to prove the existence of an agreement to arbitrate between the parties. Plaintiff also fails to cite any authority that allows this Court to order non-party Mirth Estrada to arbitrate her fee dispute with plaintiff. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVenna Ward, CSR # 7077 = (302/MJM)

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS ASHWIN LADVA and LADVA LAW FIRM'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Off calendar in light of the ruling on the demurrer. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John F. Henning, Esq., of Ladva Law Firm, Tel. 415.296.8844, appearing for defendant and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS ASHWIN LADVA and LADVA LAW FIRM'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained with twenty days leave to amend as to all claims. No legally recognizable contract or fiduciary relationship arose as a result of Defendants' knowledge of Plaintiff's lien. Plaintiff is given leave to amend, if it can do so in good faith, to allege a fiduciary or other relationship of confidence and trust between Plaintiff and Defendants, how and why Defendants owed Plaintiff a duty to disclose, and a contractual relationship upon which the implied covenant of good faith and fair dealing is based. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
